column1: Lots of folks talking about this funnel cloud. Brandon to Riverview. This is from Harbour Island. 📸 Karine Henschen

unfortunately you never know what a tornado is gonna do it could’ve dropped on you at any moment and became a vicious tornado heading right towards you. I’ve lived in tornado alley for a big part of my life and the summer. We have had four tornadoes. Always be safe.

aww how precious. "I don't wanna get hurt!" 😭 my heart. I love that yall are teaching about when it is actually a tornado and when it's not. That'll help with that fear and they'll be able to see a distant funnel cloud next time and be in awe of it rather than afraid. 🥹
